description: A corporate group that had tickets on hold is now ready to pay for their block of 100 tickets.

nodes.task_description: Look up the group's reservation and invoice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the held reservation and the corresponding invoice.

nodes.task_description: Process the payment using the corporate credit card provided.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the payment for the full invoice amount.

nodes.task_description: Release the hold on the tickets and deliver them to the group's organizer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the seats and sends a link for the organizer to manage and distribute the digital tickets.
